summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Token Zone Monitor dashboard. All core features verified working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features working: live ET clock ticks every second, provider dropdown switches Anthropic/OpenAI/Gemini correctly, model dropdown updates on provider change, zone hero shows OFF-PEAK correctly with SVG ring, metric cards show ET time/next zone/recommended, 24h bar chart and weekly heatmap render with correct colors, model limits table updates per provider/model, LIVE badge present, current 'now' cell highlighted in heatmap (Thu 12a slot).

test_results.next_zone_card: PASS - shows MODERATE in ~4h 17m at 6 AM ET
test_results.heatmap_grid: PASS - renders with zone colors, current cell highlighted
